---
title: ""
listing:
  type: default
  image-align: left
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  contents:
    - path: https://github.com
      title: "GitHub"
      description: "A longer description of what happened and what I did in the Unicef project. I woonder what is the size of text allowed in this, but it can't be too much less than this"
      image: motley/projects/visa_logo.png
    - path: https://rstudio.com
      title: "RStudio"
      description: "A longer description of what happened and what I did in the Unicef project."
      image: motley/projects/unicef_logo.png
format:
  html:
    link-external-icon: true
    link-external-newwindow: true
---
